description: Multiple cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerabilities in Xythos Enterprise Document Manager (XEDM) before 5.0.25.8, and 6.x before 6.0.46.1, allow remote authenticated users to execute commands as arbitrary users via (1) a saved Workflow name or (2) the Content-Type HTTP header.  NOTE: item 2 also affects the same version numbers of Xythos Digital Locker (XDL). One or both vectors might also affect Xythos WebFile Server.
